[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1011011 5
1 1100011 4
2 1111111 a
3 1001000 2
4 0001111 4
5 0101001 3
6 0001011 3
7 0000000 a

23 32 1001111 5
34 43 0101111 5

67 76 1011010 4
70 07 1111011 6
